description: Fragment of a letter in Hebrew apparently addressed to the brother-in-law of the writer. The addressee is asked to purchase a servant girl for the writer's sister, and reminded to safeguard a certain document, possibly connected with the writer's business partner, Shemuel. Verso is blank. No date. Related to ENA NS 77.159 + T-S 8J14.13 (PGPID 1907), and see there for other related shelfmarks.
